description_long: This doll features a stylized, cartoonish design with a large, rounded head and two prominent, upward-pointing horns. Its face is cream-colored with exaggerated, arched eyebrows, large black eyes, and a wide, toothy grin, giving it a mischievous expression. The body is slender and black, with articulated arms and legs, and oversized cream-colored gloves and shoes that evoke a vintage animation style. The surface of the doll is glossy and shows signs of wear, with visible scuffs and scratches, suggesting it is well-loved or intentionally weathered. The overall color palette is limited to black and cream, with subtle shading and highlights that enhance its three-dimensional form. This doll would likely be found as a collectible or toy in urban environments, such as parks, playgrounds, or displayed in shop windows.
description: A glossy, black and cream cartoon-style doll with a large horned head, wide grin, and oversized gloves and shoes, showing visible wear and scuffs.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the horned head, black body, and cream gloves and shoes.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the pointed head, rounded body, and the side of the face with visible eye and smile.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the expressive face, wide grin, arched eyebrows, and symmetrical gloves and shoes.
description_view_3: Right side profile similar to the left, showing the side of the head, body, and facial features.
attribute_clothing_style: Classic cartoon-inspired attire with oversized cream gloves and shoes, reminiscent of early animation characters like those from the 1920s and 1930s, with no visible fabric patterns or additional garments.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms slightly bent at the elbows and hands relaxed at the sides, legs straight and feet flat on the ground, head facing forward.
attribute_facial_expression: Smiling with a wide, toothy grin, arched eyebrows, and large, black eyes conveying a mischievous and playful demeanor.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair; the head is smooth, black, and features two prominent upward-pointing horn-like extensions.
